auth.description: No auth for local-loopback; the Idris2 ABI proves bind is loopback-only so the port is unreachable from off-box.

description: 007 agent meta-language cartridge — exposes the full oo7 CLI surface (parse/run/trace/build/test/lint/verify/contractile verbs/canonical-proof-suite/groove/self-assess) plus on-enter and on-exit lifecycle hooks that register the session as a coord peer, load the 6a2 methodology pack (STATE, META, ECOSYSTEM, AGENTIC, NEUROSYM, PLAYBOOK), and perform drift checks on exit.
name: 007-mcp

tools.description: Lifecycle hook — invoke when entering the 007-lang context. Registers this session as a coord peer (graceful degrade if local-coord-mcp is down), loads the 6a2 methodology pack (STATE, META, ECOSYSTEM, AGENTIC, NEUROSYM, PLAYBOOK), runs the memory auto-lift using repo-derived tags, and returns a structured A2ML payload with peer_id, session_token, methodology digests, and memory hits. Idempotent: calling twice returns the same peer_id/token.

session_hint.description: Optional free-form label for the session (e.g. 'afternoon m3-dispatch work')

tools.name: oo7_on_enter

tools.description: Lifecycle hook — invoke before leaving the 007-lang context. Updates STATE.a2ml's last-session fields, runs a drift check (open claims? uncommitted contractile edits? stale 6a2 files?), releases any coord task claims held by this peer, and deregisters from local-coord-mcp. Returns A2ML summary with drift findings. Safe to call even if on_enter was never invoked.

reason.description: Optional reason (e.g. 'context switch', 'session close', 'SAFE TO CLOSE')

tools.name: oo7_on_exit

tools.description: Parse a .007 source file and return the AST as JSON. Wraps `just parse <file>`.

file.description: Path to the .007 source file (relative to repo root)

tools.name: oo7_parse

tools.description: Run a .007 program and return stdout/stderr + exit code. Wraps `just run <file> <args>`.

args.description: Optional extra arguments forwarded to the recipe

tools.description: Run a .007 program and return its decision trace (branch strategy, agent moves, exchanges). Wraps `just trace <file>`.
